text: Curiosity washes over me as I step into this thoughtfully designed gallery. Glass and light frame my entrance, and a sense of anticipation grows. The words on the wall—"Responsive and rapidly... research innovating how humans connect and coexist with intelligence"—spark introspection. Here, the border between observer and observed blurs; I feel both exposed and inspired, invited to meditate on the shifting interplay of knowledge, technology, and meaning. It is exhilarating, slightly disorienting—a poetic confusion that feels almost necessary to growth.
